text:

text:
List of all Nintendo Switch demos

Thousands of games are currently available on Nintendo Switch, and there are a ton of demos out there for many of them. Not just Nintendo, but also third-parties are offering demos. text:
Evidence points to potential new LCD screen for Nintendo Switch 2

The Nintendo Switch 2 screen could be getting a revision, based on the latest evidence. On a Chinese resale site, a listing recently appeared for a a new model of the system’s LCD panel. Sharp would apparently behind the updated screen. The current Nintendo Switch 2 features a panel from Innolux. This new screen has a different circuit, connector, and...

text:

We wanted to bring attention to another Nintendo Switch publisher sale happening on the eShop, which is for Devolver Digital. The company has a bunch of games discounted. text:

text:

text:
Visual novel In Fair Spirits out on Nintendo Switch this week

Ratalaika Games is back with another release for Nintendo Switch, and has now announced In Fair Spirits for the platform. It launches on July 3, 2026. In Fair Spirits is a visual novel made by ebi-hime. text:

The latest UK software sales chart for the week ending June 27, 2026 is now available. Star Fox was the major release of the week, and it seems to have done pretty well.
